description: Root registry document consumed by BLOX when resolving templates and blocks.

__schema0.description: Optional base URL prefix used to resolve relative source values in template and block entries.

__schema1.description: Top-level templates catalog available in this registry document.

__schema3.description: Registry metadata describing a single template entry.

__schema4.description: Optional summary shown to users when listing or selecting this template.

__schema5.description: Optional categorization labels used for search, filtering, or grouping.

__schema7.description: Repository URL or local source path used to fetch this template definition and files.

__schema8.description: Optional nested block catalog that can be added from this template namespace.

__schema10.description: Registry metadata describing a single block entry.

__schema11.description: Optional summary shown to users when listing or selecting this block.

__schema12.description: Optional categorization labels used for search, filtering, or grouping.

__schema14.description: Repository URL or local source path used to fetch this block definition and files.

__schema15.description: Optional relative destination path where this block should be materialized in the target project.

title: Blox Registry Definition
